category_sources: Official project homepage describes 2ping as a bi-directional ping utility.
source_facts.description says it is a ping utility to determine directional packet loss.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README identify the project as 2ping.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation and usage.
Official project homepage includes help, development, contribution, protocol specification, and release notes.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README notes it is a mirror of forge.colobox.com/rfinnie/2ping, making the GitHub URL an official pushed source-control location but not the canonical Forge URL.
Official project homepage says development is managed with git and pushed to GitHub.
tags_sources: Official README describes 3-way pings and listener/client packet-loss comparison.
